issue_summary: Update isCyclic() to work on both directed and undirected graphs. This is part of the effort to move it to Graphs (which I'll do in a followup CL), so we can delete the GraphProperties class!
javadoc_after:
/** * Returns true iff {@code graph} has at least one cycle. A cycle is defined as a non-empty * subset of edges in a graph arranged to form a path (a sequence of adjacent outgoing edges) * starting and ending with the same node. * *

This method will detect any non-empty cycle, including self-loops (a cycle of length 1). */
